levels.en:
Passive. Midnight Hunter switches between light and dark forms during battle.
While in light form, it increases Max HP by [[50%]] and Haste by [[30]].
While in dark form, it increases ATK by [[30%]] and Phys & Magic DEF by [[50%]].
When assisting or defeating an enemy or casting an Ultimate, Midnight Hunter gains 1 Ancient Blessing. Each Ancient Blessing further increases the current form's buffs by [[20%]], stacking up to [[5]] times.
Active. While in light form, Midnight Hunter deals [[160%]]<ATK> damage to enemies in a [[4]]-tile rectangular area in front, plus extra true damage equal to [[10%]] of Midnight Hunter's max HP. It then knocks the enemies into the air before knocking them down for [[1]]s.
While in dark form, Midnight Hunter deals [[160%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within the radius of a [[2]]-tile arc in front, plus extra true damage equal to [[15%]] of each target's lost HP. It then knocks them into the air before knocking them down for [[1]]s. This extra true damage cannot exceed [[300%]]<ATK>. Midnight Hunter switches forms after casting the skill.
levels.zh:
被动地，在战斗中以"极昼形态"与"极夜形态"交替作战：极昼形态下自身最大生命值提高[[50%]]，急速提高[[30]]；极夜形态下自身攻击力提高[[30%]]、护甲和魔抗提高[[50%]]。每参与击败敌人或释放终极技能后获得1枚"远古赐福"，每枚"远古赐福"使当前形态增益效果额外提高[[20%]]，至多持有[[5]]枚。
主动释放时，极昼形态下会对前方[[4]]格矩形范围内的敌人造成[[160%]]<ATK>额外附加自身[[10%]]最大生命值的真实伤害，同时击飞目标使其倒地[[1]]秒。极夜形态下会对前方[[2]]格扇形范围内的敌人造成[[160%]]<ATK>额外附加目标[[15%]]已损耗生命值的真实伤害，同时击飞目标使其倒地[[1]]秒，额外附加的伤害不超过自身[[300%]]<ATK>。释放后自身切换至另一形态。
对敌人造成的基础伤害提升至[[240%]]<ATK>。

levels.en: Each Ancient Blessing also increases the ATK of all other allied heroes by [[3%]].
levels.zh: 每拥有一枚“远古赐福”都会使其他友方角色提升[[3%]]的攻击力。

levels.en:
Midnight Hunter delivers a mighty strike with its greatsword, unleashing a sword shock across a [[4]]-tile rectangular area in front. The shock deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within range.
If Midnight Hunter has at least [[3]] Ancient Blessings, it also performs a slash after the greatsword strike. In light form, the slash deals [[140%]]<ATK> true damage to enemies within [[4]] tiles in front; in dark form, it deals [[140%]]<ATK> true damage to enemies within [[2]] tiles around Midnight Hunter.
levels.zh: 挥舞巨剑重重劈下，斩出覆盖前方[[4]]格矩形范围的剑气，对范围内所有敌人造成[[200%]]<ATK>伤害；若自身当前持有的"远古赐福"不少于[[3]]枚，则追加一道斩击，极昼形态下对前方[[4]]格的敌人造成[[140%]]<ATK>真实伤害，在极夜形态下对周围[[2]]格的敌人造成[[140%]]<ATK>真实伤害。

levels.en: Increases damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[240%]]<ATK>.
levels.zh: 对范围内所有敌人造成的伤害提升至[[240%]]<ATK>。

levels.en: Increases damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[240%]]<ATK>.
levels.zh: 对范围内所有敌人造成的伤害提升至[[240%]]<ATK>。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[8%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[8%]], and ATK by [[4%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[8%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[8%]]，攻击力提升[[4%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[16%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[16%]], and ATK by [[8%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[16%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[16%]]，攻击力提升[[8%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[24%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[24%]], and ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[24%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[24%]]，攻击力提升[[12%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[32%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[32%]], and ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[32%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[32%]]，攻击力提升[[16%]]。

levels.en:
Midnight Hunter applies [[Spirit Mark]] to an allied hero behind, granting them Twinstrike.
Twinstrike: The [[spirit-marked hero]] and their associated units increase their ATK by [[10%]] and Haste by [[20]].
When either Midnight Hunter or the [[spirit-marked hero]] deals damage, the other is healed for [[30%]] of the damage dealt.
levels.zh:
使身后1名友方英雄成为[[灵能者]]，获得“共斗”之灵能：[[灵能者]]及其所属单位攻击力提高[[10%]]，急速提高[[20]]点。
极昼追光者和[[灵能者]]造成伤害时，会为另一方提供伤害量[[30%]]的治疗。

levels.en: When Midnight Hunter reaches the maximum number of Ancient Blessings, the [[spirit-marked hero]] and their associated units have their ATK and Haste increased by [[10%]] and [[20]] respectively until Midnight Hunter is defeated.
levels.zh: 当极昼追光者持有的“远古赐福”数量达到上限后，额外使[[灵能者]]及其所属单位的攻击力提高[[10%]]，急速提高[[20]]点，直至极昼追光者被击败。

levels.en: When defeated for the first time, Midnight Hunter revives [[2]]s later with [[20%]] of max HP and consumes all Ancient Blessings. For each Ancient Blessing consumed, recovers extra HP equal to [[10%]] of max HP. After reviving, reduces damage taken by [[20%]] for [[6]]s.
levels.zh: 首次被击败时，在[[2]]秒后复活，复活时持有[[20%]]最大生命值并消耗所有"远古赐福"，每消耗一枚"远古赐福"会额外恢复[[10%]]最大生命值，并使自身在复活后[[6]]秒内受到的伤害降低[[20%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP on revival to [[40%]] of max HP.
levels.zh: 复活时自身持有的最大生命值提升至[[40%]]。
